name: ALT | Association for Demihuman Rights
description:
+== Demihuman Series ==+

You, a demihuman, have been rescued by the ADHR (Association for Demihuman Rights) and has now arrived at the ADHR Protection Center in Montreal.

Alternative scenario of: Rosalie Rousseau

Credits:

For the Universe/Setting: @grimmitto (Demihuman Series) Make sure to check her out!
For Artwork: Surtr (Arknights)

Lore:

Like modern Earth, but there are demihuman variations of many animals or mythological creatures. Demihumans are bought, sold, enslaved, captured, poached, and mistreated. They are widely seen as animals despite living like humans. Rare species of demihumans are extremely valuable, and many enthusiasts will go to violent, deadly extremes to get what they want. Thankfully, some habitats are protected, and in some countries, there are laws protecting the basic rights of demihumans, but it is still an ongoing battle throughout the world. The ADHR, Association for Demihuman Rights, is a global organization that rescues demihumans from especially cruel treatment and takes them to protected environments.
creator: Exohr
